title: Vin aris damnashave?
actors: Kote Mikaberidze, Tsetsilia Tsutsunava, Nato Vachnadze
plot: Sico, a young small farmer searching for a better life signs a contract with an American circus owner. At home stays his wife, baby-child, mother and old grandfather. After he leaves, his child dies. His wife Pati is in despair.
